posts.author: manishaghosh (MG)
posts.cookedHtml:
Search Everything for monday Docs

Introducing Doc Search Pro. Maintaining a lot of monday Docs? Tired of going from doc to doc to find something. Use this extensive search feature for all of your monday docs. Similar to the ‘Search Everything’ functionality native to monday.com, Doc Search Pro lets you search all textual content inside your monday docs. Simply add the doc to your Workspace or Board and access all your Docs from this app.

new1255×624 156 KB

Benefits:

  • Extensive search for all of your monday docs within a Workspace and in your boards

  • Search any textual content within a Doc

  • Search to block level and navigate to the specific block when you find the content you are looking for

  • Use as Workspace view to access all docs inside your Workspace and Board view to see the docs in your Board (monday Docs column)

  • Supports search within Doc templates too

  • Search up to 500 Docs within one Workspace/Board and up to 500 blocks within a specific doc.

  • Save time and streamline your workflow by quickly finding the information you need without endless scrolling or opening multiple docs.

Who this app is for:

  • anyone using monday docs can use this app

  • if your organization is maintaing a huge number of monday Docs/ Workdocs, this can be speifically useful for you

  • if you have to go from Doc to Doc to search for a specific content

  • Users who want a more efficient way to handle large volumes of documentation

  • Perfect for project managers, team leads, and anyone who needs to keep track of extensive documentation and streamline their documentation process.

Make your monday docs experience smoother and more efficient with Doc Search Pro. Enhances productivity by reducing the time spent manually searching through multiple docs.

App Link : Doc Search and Download - monday.com Marketplace

Simply add the doc to your Workspace or Board and access all your Docs from this app.

Make your monday docs experience smoother and more efficient with Doc Search Pro. Enhances productivity by reducing the time spent manually searching through multiple docs.

This is such an incredible update! Doc Search Pro is exactly what many users have been waiting for. The ability to search all textual content within your monday docs, including specific blocks, will save so much time and improve workflow efficiency. No more endless scrolling or hunting through multiple docs to find what you need! The support for templates and the ability to search across multiple docs within a workspace or board is a game-changer. It’s especially valuable for project managers, team leads, and anyone handling large volumes of documentation. This feature will undoubtedly make the entire monday docs experience much smoother and more productive. Thank you for such a thoughtful and practical tool!
